title: Repottery
description: Repottery gives new life to pots in Minecraft.
body:
**Repottery** is a resource pack that gives new life to pots in Minecraft. Pots are now divided into categories: flat (saplings, azalea, fern, dead bush, bamboo, cactus, roots and mushrooms), vases (tulips), small (all small flowers) and big pots (wither roses and torchflowers). All pots have a simple 360 degree rotation. **Repottery** also adds a new look to decorated pots, including the ones added in 23w12a snapshot.
#
**This pack does not require OptiFine or any of its alternatives to work.**
#
Also available on Planet Minecraft: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/repottery/
